memories.text: The user traced the Haidarabad Codex and informed Professor Edward Granville Browne about its merits, resulting in the codex being the first item in the Memorial of literary work done in the name of the Turkish scholar and being safeguarded in hundred-fold facsimile
The user had a husband who saw the Haidarabad Codex in 1900, and the user was lent the codex by the late Sayyid Ali Bilgrami
